fr-commencal-supreme-dh-v5.note: Weight 5,3kg MAKER-CONFIRMED (23CSUP1) but verification DEFERRED: maker complete-bike page (23SUPR) states rear hub 157x12mm (native SuperBoost157 + 157->150 conversion kit A22WHADAPDHV5), so catalog rearAxle 150x12 is WRONG and travel is 220 not 200.
